title: UK loosens Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise
summary: The UK has eased sanctions on Russian oil imports amid supply concerns from the effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz affecting global fuel availability. The waiver reflects mounting pressure on energy supply chains and prices.
content: The waiver reflects increasing supply concerns over certain fuels due to the effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 英国放宽对俄罗斯石油制裁，燃料价格上升
zh.summary: 英国在全球燃料供应受到霍尔木兹海峡有效封锁影响而出现供应问题的背景下，放宽了对俄罗斯石油进口的制裁。这一豁免反映了能源供应链和价格面临的日益增长的压力。

title: U.S. Treasury yields inch lower as bond markets price 'significant' inflation risk
summary: US Treasury yields declined as bond markets reassess significant inflation risks and their impact on economic growth. Investors continue monitoring inflation expectations amid broader economic uncertainty.
content: Yields on U.S. Treasurys moved lower early Wednesday, as investors continue to monitor "significant" inflation risks.

zh.title: 美国国债收益率下降，债券市场定价"重大"通胀风险
zh.summary: 美国国债收益率下降，因为债券市场重新评估重大通胀风险及其对经济增长的影响。投资者在更广泛的经济不确定性中继续监测通胀预期。

title: UK inflation rate eases to 2.8% in April, but slowdown is expected to be short-lived
summary: UK inflation fell to 2.8% in April, exceeding economist expectations and signaling a temporary slowdown from the prior 3.3% rate. However, experts warn this easing may prove short-lived.
content: Economists polled by Reuters had expected the inflation rate to drop back to 3%, cooling from 3.3% in March.

zh.title: 英国通胀率在4月降至2.8%，但预计放缓将是短暂的
zh.summary: 英国通胀率在4月下降至2.8%，超过经济学家预期，表明从之前的3.3%出现临时放缓。然而，专家警告这种缓解可能是短暂的。

title: Alibaba reveals more powerful Zhenwu AI chip, new LLM
summary: Alibaba unveiled a more powerful version of its Zhenwu AI chip alongside a new large language model, strengthening its competitive position in the AI market. The upgrades reflect intensifying competition in semiconductor and AI development.
content: Alibaba announced updates to its AI offerings, including a more powerful chip and a new large language model.

zh.title: 阿里巴巴推出功能更强大的芯武AI芯片和新的大语言模型
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴推出了其芯武AI芯片的更强大版本，以及一个新的大型语言模型，加强了它在人工智能市场的竞争地位。这些升级反映了半导体和人工智能开发中竞争的加剧。

title: Over 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers set to strike as wage talks break down, sending shares lower
summary: Over 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers are set to strike Thursday after wage negotiations with management collapsed. The labor action is expected to pressure the company's stock and production capacity.
content: More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers will begin a strike on Thursday after wage negotiations between the company and its union broke down.

zh.title: 超过47,000名三星电子员工因工资谈判破裂而准备罢工，导致股价下跌
zh.summary: 超过47,000名三星电子员工将在周四进行罢工，原因是与管理层的工资谈判破裂。这一劳动行动预计将对公司的股票和生产能力造成压力。

title: European stocks to open lower: UK inflation and elevated bond yields in focus
summary: European stock markets are expected to open lower as investors focus on UK inflation data and persistently elevated bond yields. The combination of macro headwinds is weighing on regional equity sentiment.
content: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory on Wednesday as global markets keep a close eye on elevated bond yields and UK inflation data.

zh.title: 欧洲股市开盘走低：英国通胀和上升的债券收益率成焦点
zh.summary: 欧洲股市预计开盘走低，因为投资者关注英国通胀数据和持续上升的债券收益率。宏观不利因素的组合正在压低地区股市情绪。

title: U.S. indicts four Chinese container manufacturers alleging pandemic-era price-fixing cartel
summary: The US Department of Justice indicted four Chinese container manufacturers for allegedly operating a cartel to reduce output during the pandemic era. The charges underscore growing tensions over global supply chain competition and anti-competitive behavior.
content: China International Marine Containers, Singamas Container Holdings, Shanghai Universal Logistics Equipment, and CXIC Group Containers colluded to cut container output: DOJ

zh.title: 美国起诉四家中国集装箱制造商涉嫌疫情时期价格垄断卡特尔
zh.summary: 美国司法部对四家中国集装箱制造商进行起诉，指控其在疫情时期涉嫌参与卡特尔组织以减少产出。这些指控凸显了全球供应链竞争和反竞争行为日益加剧的紧张局势。

title: Stocks under pressure as correction fears grow and record rally defies geopolitical turmoil
summary: Stock markets face increasing pressure as analysts warn of potential corrections despite a record-breaking rally that has weathered recent geopolitical turmoil. Market sentiment is shifting as participants reassess valuation risk.
content: "'The pendulum could swing backwards," analysts said on Tuesday amid mounting warnings that equities could soon change course.

zh.title: 股市承压，修正恐惧加剧，创纪录涨幅抵抗地缘政治动荡
zh.summary: 尽管创纪录的涨幅经受住了近期地缘政治动荡的考验，股市仍面临越来越大的压力，分析师警告称存在潜在的市场修正风险。随着参与者重新评估估值风险，市场情绪正在转变。

title: Putin-Xi talks revive stalled Russian gas pipeline as Iran war rattles energy markets
summary: Russian President Putin is expected to discuss reviving the long-stalled Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline with Chinese leader Xi Jinping amid energy market disruption from Iran conflict developments. The pipeline revial could reshape Eurasian energy flows.
content: Putin is expected to hold talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping on Wednesday, with the long-stalled Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline topping the agenda.

zh.title: 普京-习近平会谈重启停滞的俄罗斯天然气管道，伊朗战争冲击能源市场
zh.summary: 在伊朗冲突引发能源市场中断之际，俄罗斯总统普京预计将与中国领导人习近平讨论重启长期停滞的西伯利亚力量2号天然气管道。该管道的重启可能重塑欧亚能源流。

title: China confirms order for 200 Boeing planes, calls aviation key area for U.S. cooperation
summary: China confirmed an order for 200 Boeing aircraft, marking its largest purchase in nearly a decade and signaling improved US-China trade relations. The agreement represents a major win for Boeing and broader aviation sector cooperation.
content: China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, its first major order in nearly a decade, U.S. President Donald Trump said last week.

zh.title: 中国确认订购200架波音飞机，称航空是美中合作的关键领域
zh.summary: 中国确认订购200架波音飞机，这是近十年来最大规模采购，表明美中贸易关系改善。该协议对波音公司和航空部门更广泛的合作是重大利好。

title: Why fashion is doubling down on sustainability even as value-seeking shoppers ignore the pitch
summary: The fashion industry continues emphasizing sustainability initiatives despite evidence that price-conscious consumers are not prioritizing environmental credentials in purchasing decisions. The disconnect reveals tension between industry commitments and consumer behavior.
content: A strange paradox has taken hold of the global fashion industry.

zh.title: 为何时尚品牌加倍推行可持续发展，而追求性价比的消费者却不理会
zh.summary: 尽管有证据表明价格敏感的消费者在购买时不优先考虑环保认证，时尚产业仍在继续强调可持续发展举措。这种矛盾反映了行业承诺与消费者行为之间的张力。

title: China confirms it will buy 200 Boeing jets after Trump-Xi summit
summary: China formally confirmed its purchase of 200 Boeing jets following the Trump-Xi summit, with both nations agreeing to extend their October tariff truce. The agreement reflects a thaw in US-China trade tensions.
content: The two sides will also work towards an extension to the tariffs truce they agreed in October, China's Commerce Ministry said.

zh.title: 特朗普-习近平峰会后，中国确认将购买200架波音喷气式飞机
zh.summary: 中国在特朗普-习近平峰会后正式确认购买200架波音喷气式飞机，两国同意延长十月份的关税休战。该协议反映美中贸易紧张局势的缓解。

title: U.S. airlines oppose Trump plan to require small airports to use private security, Reuters reports
summary: Major US airlines are opposing a White House proposal requiring smaller airports to replace TSA security screeners with private contractors. The industry argues the plan would undermine security standards and efficiency at regional facilities.
content: A group representing major U.S. airlines opposes a White House proposal to require smaller airports to use private security screeners instead of the TSA.

zh.title: 美国航空公司反对特朗普要求小型机场使用私人安保的计划，路透社报道
zh.summary: 美国主要航空公司反对白宫提案，该提案要求小型机场用私人承包商替代美国运输安全管理局的安检人员。业界辩称该计划会削弱区域设施的安全标准和效率。

title: Nvidia to launch Singapore research hub as city-state boosts AI plans
summary: Nvidia announced plans to establish a research hub in Singapore, including the city-state's first physical AI testbed for research and deployment. The investment reflects Singapore's emergence as a strategic hub for AI innovation and development.
content: Singapore has announced a new Nvidia research center and its first testbed to research, test and deploy physical AI, along with industry leaders.

zh.title: 随着城市国家推进AI计划，英伟达将在新加坡推出研究中心
zh.summary: 英伟达宣布计划在新加坡建立研究中心，包括该城市国家首个物理AI测试平台，用于研究和部署。该投资反映了新加坡作为AI创新和发展战略枢纽的崛起。

title: Singapore inks AI deals with Google, OpenAI as ChatGPT-maker commits $234 million to local ecosystem
summary: Singapore signed new AI partnerships with Google and OpenAI, with OpenAI committing $234 million to develop local AI capabilities and infrastructure. The deals position Singapore as a key global hub for AI development and collaboration.
content: Singapore has signed new partnerships with Google and OpenAI to strengthen the city-state's position as a global AI hub and accelerating AI deployment.

zh.title: 随着ChatGPT制造商承诺投入2.34亿美元，新加坡与谷歌、OpenAI签署AI协议
zh.summary: 新加坡与谷歌和OpenAI签署新的AI伙伴关系协议，OpenAI承诺投入2.34亿美元开发本地AI能力和基础设施。这些协议将新加坡定位为全球AI开发和协作的关键枢纽。

title: Goldman Sachs says AI and energy resilience are creating a North-South divide in Asian markets
summary: Goldman Sachs reports that North Asian markets are outperforming South Asian peers due to stronger fiscal capacity and AI development advantages. This divergence reflects how technological advancement and economic resources are creating distinct investment trajectories across the region.
content: North Asian markets are outperforming South Asian markets, supported by stronger fiscal ability and AI developments, Goldman said.

zh.title: 高盛表示人工智能和能源韧性在亚洲市场造成南北分化
zh.summary: 高盛报告称，由于财政实力更强且人工智能发展优势，北亚市场的表现优于南亚同行。这种分化反映了技术进步和经济资源如何在整个地区创造了不同的投资轨迹。

title: Another Trump victory: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie loses Kentucky primary
summary: President Trump's endorsed candidate defeated Rep. Thomas Massie in the Kentucky Republican primary, marking another successful intervention in party races. Massie had opposed key GOP priorities, making him a target for Trump-backed opposition.
content: President Donald Trump had targeted Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., for opposing GOP priorities.

zh.title: 又一场特朗普胜利：共和党众议员托马斯·马西在肯塔基州初选中落败
zh.summary: 特朗普支持的候选人在肯塔基州共和党初选中击败了众议员托马斯·马西，标志着特朗普在党派竞赛中又一次成功干预。马西曾反对关键的共和党优先事项，使他成为特朗普支持的反对力量的目标。

title: Asia markets open lower as Treasury yields climb and Iran tensions linger
summary: Asia-Pacific stock markets declined as investors reacted to rising U.S. Treasury yields and escalating geopolitical tensions with Iran. The combination of higher bond yields and regional instability pressured equities across the region.
content: Asia-Pacific markets fell on Wednesday as investors weighed elevated bond yields and renewed geopolitical tensions.

zh.title: 随着美国国债收益率上升和伊朗紧张局势持续，亚洲市场低开
zh.summary: 亚太股市下跌，因为投资者对美国国债收益率上升和伊朗地缘政治紧张局势升级作出反应。更高的债券收益率和地区不稳定性的结合对整个地区的股票造成了压力。

title: UBS says China tech trade ‘makes a lot of sense’ as AI ecosystem grows
summary: UBS argues that Chinese technology stocks present an attractive investment opportunity as China's AI ecosystem expands and U.S.-China tensions ease. The improving conditions are reviving analyst interest in Chinese equities after prior geopolitical concerns.
content: An expanding AI ecosystem and easing tensions with the U.S. are reviving the case for Chinese equities, particularly tech stocks, according to UBS.

zh.title: 瑞银表示，随着人工智能生态系统的增长，中国科技贸易"很有意义"
zh.summary: 瑞银辩称，随着中国人工智能生态系统的扩展和美中紧张局势缓解，中国科技股票呈现出有吸引力的投资机会。不断改善的条件正在恢复分析师对中国股票的兴趣，此前由于地缘政治问题而受到关注。

title: My late mother’s bank account is $2,000 short. Can the bank legally refuse to provide her final statement?
summary: A beneficiary questions banking regulations when a deceased relative's account is short funds and the bank may be unwilling to provide documentation. The case highlights consumer rights issues in inheritance situations and account transparency.
content: ‘I am the beneficiary on her checking account’

zh.title: 我已故母亲的银行账户缺少2000美元。银行是否可以合法拒绝提供她的最终结算单？
zh.summary: 一位受益人在已故亲属的账户资金不足且银行可能不愿提供文件时质疑银行法规。该案例突出了继承情况下的消费者权利问题和账户透明度。

title: I’m selling my $1 million Maui home. Will my agent charge me less than a 6% commission?
summary: A homeowner questions whether the traditional 6% real estate commission model is changing following 2024 legislation aimed at reforming industry practices. The article examines whether sellers can negotiate lower fees in a shifting market.
content: “Legislation introduced in 2024 was designed to finally upend the traditional 6% real-estate commission model.”

zh.title: 我正在出售我在毛伊岛价值100万美元的房产。我的代理人会向我收取低于6%的佣金吗？
zh.summary: 一位房主质疑在旨在改革行业做法的2024年立法之后，传统的6%房地产佣金模式是否在改变。本文研究了卖家在变化的市场中是否可以协商降低费用。
